texto: Guys will NEVER understand what it is like to be a girl and all the pain we have to deal with therefore they should shut up about things they don't understand. Likewise girls will NEVER know what it is like to be a guy and all the pressure they deal with, so shut up girls as well.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Megan Wilson: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de limites e escolhas conscientes. O trecho “Guys will NEVER understand what it is like to be a girl and all the pain we have to deal with the…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que reflexao, honesty, reality-of-life pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de reality-of-life.

texto: Some people are angels sent to you by God at your weakest moments.

texto: In the long run - everyone is different, but we are all human. Everyone deserves love no matter what they look like, everyone needs faith in their life, hope in their heart, and love to give for otherwise life will be terrible. Everyone makes mistakes, NO ONE is perfect (yes that means YOU reading this and it means ME as well). I believe we all need to be more accepting, less judgmental, more loving, less bitter, and more willing to look past the flaws at the person inside.

Everyone deserves love no matter w…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que reflexao, truth-of-life, everyone pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de reflexao.

texto: The people you are closest to tend to be able to hurt you the most - that is why heartbreak is so hard to deal with, why death is so painful, and why fights can destroy things that matter.
